additional_rules.name: ngmodule-declaration
additional_rules.message: NgModule detected — prefer standalone components for new code
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace NgModule-based components with standalone: true in the @Component decorator. Move imports array to the component's imports field.

additional_rules.name: legacy-decorator-input
additional_rules.message: Legacy @Input() decorator — prefer signal input() function
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace @Input() foo: T with foo = input<T>() or foo = input.required<T>() from @angular/core.

additional_rules.name: legacy-decorator-output
additional_rules.message: Legacy @Output() decorator — prefer signal output() function
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace @Output() myEvent = new EventEmitter<T>() with myEvent = output<T>() from @angular/core.

additional_rules.name: missing-onpush
additional_rules.message: Component may be missing OnPush change detection — set changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush to the @Component decorator. Ensure template reads only signals or pure pipes.
additional_rules._note: This is a structural check — engine delegates to layer-2 linter or agent. Rule documents the convention.

additional_rules.name: manual-subscribe
additional_rules.message: Manual .subscribe() detected — prefer toSignal() or takeUntilDestroyed() to prevent memory leaks
additional_rules.fix_hint: Use toSignal(observable$) for template consumption or pipe(takeUntilDestroyed(this.destroyRef)) for long-lived subscriptions.

additional_rules.name: async-pipe-usage
additional_rules.message: async pipe detected — prefer toSignal() for OnPush-compatible reactive templates
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace '| async' with toSignal(observable$, { initialValue: ... }) in the component class. Works transparently with OnPush.

additional_rules.name: constructor-injection
additional_rules.message: Constructor injection detected — prefer inject() function for tree-shakeable DI
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace constructor(private service: MyService) with private service = inject(MyService) as a class field.

additional_rules.name: component-naming-convention
additional_rules.message: Angular @Component in a file that doesn't follow the *.component.ts naming convention
additional_rules.fix_hint: Rename the file to follow Angular naming: feature-name.component.ts

additional_rules.name: service-naming-convention
additional_rules.message: Angular @Injectable in a file that doesn't follow the *.service.ts naming convention
additional_rules.fix_hint: Rename the file to follow Angular naming: feature-name.service.ts

additional_rules.name: img-missing-alt
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add alt="descriptive text" or alt="" for decorative images

additional_rules.name: click-without-keyboard
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add (keydown) handler or use a <button> element

additional_rules.name: hardcoded-color-no-contrast-check
additional_rules.message: Hardcoded color — verify WCAG contrast ratio (4.5:1 for text)
additional_rules.fix_hint: Use design tokens or verify contrast with a tool

additional_rules.name: input-without-label
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or a <label> with matching for/id

additional_boundaries.name: Feature modules must not import from other feature modules
additional_boundaries.message: Feature module imports from another feature module — shared code should be in a shared/ directory
